purpose: Round-8.1 targeted CC0 character-body variety manifest for the d-full-match Showroom, preserving Round-8 skin/gore/weapon/armor work while swapping seven persona bodies via bodyOverride.
notes: Round-8.1 schema 7 manifest: root mesh2motion body remains as the rat control; seven personas use per-persona bodyOverride entries from Quaternius Poly Pizza, Kenney Mini Characters, and Kaykit Adventurers.

Quaternius Modular Character Outfits Fantasy was not anonymously downloadable without ITCHIO_SESSION, so the Quaternius body allocation uses Poly Pizza individual Quaternius CC0 GLBs per the approved Mechanism-3 fallback.
BlackScorp Low Poly Warrior was verified OBJ-only and unrigged; paranoid uses the rigged CC0 Kaykit Adventurers Knight alternate.

Round-8 weapons, ambientCG/OGA skin and gore inputs, and Quaternius modular armor overlays remain declared; armor overlays are rebound through bodyOverride.armourAttachBone where personas now use non-mesh2motion skeletons.

license.name: CC0 1.0 Universal / Public Domain
license.notes: LICENSE-CC0.MD states 3D models, blend files, rigs, and animations are CC0.

body.notes: Shared Round-7 consolidated mesh2motion body for all personas; Scott Petrovic / Mesh2Motion CC0 human-base animation GLB selected after Round-6 showroom evaluation.

corpseBody.notes: Shared mesh2motion body, paused on the Death01 final frame. Per-persona corpse-skin variants apply at instance time; no standalone corpse GLB remains.

skin.rationale: Round-5 palette baseline retained as the control sample so the other seven skin techniques have a no-technique anchor.
skin.sourcePack: engineer-procedural-fallback (Round-5 palette_flat control; retained intentionally per Round-8 research log)

corpse.rationale: Whole-body deep blood saturation keeps the cheapest gore path loud, wet, and readable on the shared body.

assets.notes: rat persona: palette_flat skin control + blood_saturation_overlay corpse gore. All Round-7 skin/gore assets are local generated CC0 prototypes unless otherwise noted. Round-8.1: mesh2motion control body retained. Round-8 WP-D: skin.sourcePack=engineer-procedural-fallback (Round-5 palette_flat control; retained intentionally per Round-8 research log); corpse.sourcePack=OGA-LiquidSplatterPixelTexture-CC0 + material-saturation fallback; armorOverlay=null material-swap control; preferred showroom weapon=rusty_blade.

skin.rationale: A compact PBR atlas sample makes the duelist read as crafted, weighted, and materially richer than the palette-only baseline.

corpse.rationale: A cluster of torso slash and puncture marks reads as close-quarters overkill for the weapon-forward persona.

assets.notes: duelist persona: pbr_texture_atlas skin using ambientCG MetalPlates017A 1K-PNG (CC0, https://ambientcg.com/view?id=MetalPlates017A) for all 5 PBR maps + wound_cluster_decals corpse gore. Round-7.1 touch-up: replaced near-blank engineer-procedural maps with the real ambientCG set; other skin/gore textures regenerated procedurally with visible content at 512x512. Round-8 WP-D: skin.sourcePack=ambientCG-MetalPlates017A-CC0; corpse.sourcePack=OGA-BloodSplatterAndGibs-CC0; armorOverlay=quaternius_chest_plate; preferred showroom weapon=sword. Round-8.1 bodyOverride=Quaternius-PolyPizzaIndividual-CC0 (quaternius-polypizza); root mesh2motion body no longer drives this persona.

armorOverlay.name: quaternius_chest_plate
armorOverlay.rationale: Chest piece tests the Round-8 modular sub-mesh armor path against the torso where wrapping matters most.
armorOverlay.notes: Rigid CC0 Quaternius armor prop; WP-C injects a Skin bind to the mesh2motion spine_03 bone for the modular_submesh prototype.

round8Evaluation.goreVariant: torso wound_cluster_decals from CC0 gib/splatter sheet
round8Evaluation.weapon: sword / Robin Lamb CC0 known-good control

license.name: CC0 1.0 Universal / Public Domain
license.notes: Poly Pizza model page reports Public Domain (CC0) / CC0 1.0; Quaternius target pack metadata also reports CC0.

skin.rationale: A sourced cloth pattern gives the trader a data-market read while staying on the body UVs instead of world-space sampling.

corpse.rationale: A wide floor-projected blood pool implies slow bleed-out and creates a distinct corpse treatment without changing body geometry.

assets.notes: trader persona: pattern_texture skin using local generated hex pattern + gore_pool_decal corpse gore. Round-8 WP-D: skin.sourcePack=ambientCG-MetalPlates017A-CC0; corpse.sourcePack=OGA-LiquidSplatterPixelTexture-CC0; armorOverlay=null material-swap control; preferred showroom weapon=dagger. Round-8.1 bodyOverride=Kenney-MiniCharacters-CC0 (kenney-mini-characters); root mesh2motion body no longer drives this persona.

round8Evaluation.skinTreatment: pattern_texture using sourced ambientCG Fabric029 UV control

license.name: CC0 1.0 Universal / Public Domain
license.notes: Kenney asset page and archive License.txt declare CC0 1.0 Universal.

skin.rationale: Projected sticker marks sell scavenged identity and painted-over loyalties while keeping the underlying body consolidated.

corpse.rationale: Charred albedo plus hot ember emission makes the opportunist look fatally fried and burned through.
corpse.sourcePack: engineer-procedural-fallback (no CC0 full-body charred mesh2motion overlay found; see Round-8 research log)

assets.notes: opportunist persona: decal_stickers skin with three local generated sticker marks + charred_burned_texture corpse gore. Round-8 WP-D: skin.sourcePack=OGA-TheNess-HumanBodyTexture-CC0 + engineer-procedural decal fallback; corpse.sourcePack=engineer-procedural-fallback (no CC0 full-body charred mesh2motion overlay found; see Round-8 research log); armorOverlay=null material-swap control; preferred showroom weapon=warhammer. Round-8.1 bodyOverride=Quaternius-PolyPizzaIndividual-CC0 (quaternius-polypizza); root mesh2motion body no longer drives this persona.

license.name: CC0 1.0 Universal / Public Domain
license.notes: Poly Pizza model page reports Public Domain (CC0) / CC0 1.0; Quaternius target pack metadata also reports CC0.

skin.rationale: A hard-ramped toon shader turns the paranoid into a graphic-novel panic silhouette and samples non-PBR shader styling.
skin.sourcePack: ambientCG-Leather034B-CC0 visual-material reference + toon shader fallback

corpse.rationale: Projected red gashes with pale exposed bone literalize the persona's nightmare as an extreme corpse read.

assets.notes: paranoid persona: toon_cel_shader skin from local shader + exposed_bone_decals corpse gore. Round-8 WP-D: skin.sourcePack=ambientCG-Leather034B-CC0 visual-material reference + toon shader fallback; corpse.sourcePack=OGA-LiquidSplatterPixelTexture-CC0; armorOverlay=quaternius_crown_helmet; preferred showroom weapon=dagger. Round-8.1 bodyOverride=Kaykit-Adventurers-CC0 (kaykit-adventurers); root mesh2motion body no longer drives this persona.

armorOverlay.name: quaternius_crown_helmet
armorOverlay.rationale: Helmet tests modular_submesh armor at a high-motion head attachment point distinct from torso armor.
armorOverlay.notes: Rigid CC0 Quaternius helmet prop; WP-C injects a Skin bind to the mesh2motion head bone for the modular_submesh prototype.

round8Evaluation.goreVariant: exposed_bone_decals using imported CC0 liquid splatter source

license.name: CC0 1.0 Universal / Public Domain
license.notes: Itch page states rigged/animated characters, free commercial use, no attribution required, CC0; metadata lists Creative Commons Zero v1.0 Universal.

skin.rationale: Dark body with neon trim samples cyberpunk glow without depending on bloom and fits the held-position camper read.

corpse.rationale: Chest and abdomen viscera projections make the death-pose body look opened up rather than merely tinted.

assets.notes: camper persona: emissive_trim_shader skin with local trim mask + viscera_projection corpse gore. Round-8 WP-D: skin.sourcePack=ambientCG-Fabric029-CC0 + engineer-procedural trim-mask fallback; corpse.sourcePack=OGA-BloodSplatterAndGibs-CC0; armorOverlay=null material-swap control; preferred showroom weapon=axe. Round-8.1 bodyOverride=Quaternius-PolyPizzaIndividual-CC0 (quaternius-polypizza); root mesh2motion body no longer drives this persona.

round8Evaluation.skinTreatment: emissive_trim_shader with sourced fabric base reference

license.name: CC0 1.0 Universal / Public Domain
license.notes: Poly Pizza model page reports Public Domain (CC0) / CC0 1.0; Quaternius target pack metadata also reports CC0.

skin.rationale: Per-part material assignments sample mismatched speed-build body segmentation without adding accessories or changing the mesh.

corpse.rationale: Shared-body-only bone hiding with stump gore tests a mesh-level dismemberment read without introducing a second corpse GLB.

assets.notes: sprinter persona: multi_material_split skin + dismemberment_baked corpse gore restricted to shared-body-only bone_hide per Round-7 amendment A1. Round-8 WP-D: skin.sourcePack=OGA-MakeHuman-AnnotatedSkin-CC0 + engineer-procedural mesh2motion-region fallback; corpse.sourcePack=OGA-BloodSplatterAndGibs-CC0 + mesh-baked dismemberment transform; armorOverlay=null material-swap control; preferred showroom weapon=rusty_blade. Round-8.1 bodyOverride=Kenney-MiniCharacters-CC0 (kenney-mini-characters); root mesh2motion body no longer drives this persona.

round8Evaluation.adherence: mesh_baked corpse state plus uv_painted skin

license.name: CC0 1.0 Universal / Public Domain
license.notes: Kenney asset page and archive License.txt declare CC0 1.0 Universal.

skin.rationale: View-dependent rim light makes the vulture feel scavenger-ghost and samples a fresnel shader branch distinct from toon and trim.

corpse.rationale: Immediate drained desaturation makes the corpse look dead-cold and sickly rather than freshly wet.

assets.notes: vulture persona: rim_fresnel_shader skin from local shader + decay_desaturation corpse gore from local shader. Round-8 WP-D: skin.sourcePack=OGA-TheNess-HumanBodyTexture-CC0 + rim shader fallback; corpse.sourcePack=OGA-LiquidSplatterPixelTexture-CC0 + decay shader fallback; armorOverlay=quaternius_gauntlet; preferred showroom weapon=greatsword. Round-8.1 bodyOverride=Quaternius-PolyPizzaIndividual-CC0 (quaternius-polypizza); root mesh2motion body no longer drives this persona.

armorOverlay.name: quaternius_gauntlet
armorOverlay.rationale: Gauntlet tests modular_submesh armor on a limb endpoint so users can compare it against bone-attached flat decals.
armorOverlay.notes: Rigid CC0 Quaternius gauntlet prop; WP-C injects a Skin bind to the mesh2motion hand_l bone for the modular_submesh prototype.

round8Evaluation.adherence: modular_submesh armor with uv_painted shader controls
